basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) Consultant – Statistics and Data Analytics Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website https://www.nabcons.com/ under Advt. No. NABCONS/CO-HR/10/CCS/2026-27. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NABCONS Consultant – Statistics and Data Analytics Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduate and/or Post Graduation with 55% at the aggregate from a recognized University in Statistics, Economics, Data Science, Data Analytics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Information Management, Business Administration/ Business Analytics or any related field; certificate/Diploma of minimum of 6 months course of Data Analytics; Minimum 5 years of work experience with at least 2 years' experience in Data Analytics in fields related to Consultancy sector
qualification.details: Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics: First Class Graduate and/or Post Graduation with 55% at the aggregate from a recognized University in Statistics, Economics, Data Science, Data Analytics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Information Management, Business Administration/ Business Analytics or any related field; certificate/Diploma of minimum of 6 months course of Data Analytics; Minimum 5 years of work experience with at least 2 years' experience in Data Analytics in fields related to Consultancy sector.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per industry standards and NABCONS policy
salary_details.details: Salary will be as per industry standards and NABCONS policy.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NABCONS Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics Job 2026 Notificatio

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABCONS Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics post?
faq.answer: A First Class Graduate and/or Post Graduation with 55% aggregate is required in fields like Statistics, Economics, Data Science, Data Analytics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Information Management, Business Administration/Business Analytics, along with a Data Analytics certificate/diploma of at least 6 months.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the NABCONS Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant - Statistics and Data Analytics position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum work experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of work experience is required, with at least 2 years specifically in Data Analytics within the consultancy sector.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for this recruitment must be submitted online only through the official website or the provided application link.
